title: collomia linearis f. humilis
intro: Collomia linearis f. humilis, also known as Humble Skyrocket, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Phlox family and is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Collomia linearis f. humilis include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
